item.title: Free GDPR Compliance Checker
item.description: See the compliance levels of your organization according to GDPR standards.

item.title: How to Prevent Software Supply-Chain Attacks
item.description: Do you want to learn about how to prevent software supply chain attacks? Learn your supply-chain risk before it’s too late.

item.title: Focus Friday: Third-Party Risks In DrayTek Vigor Routers, VMware ESXi, Apache Tomcat, and Axios HTTP Client Vulnerabilities
item.description: Explore key vulnerabilities in DrayTek routers, VMware ESXi, Apache Tomcat, and Axios HTTP Client from a TPRM perspective.

item.title: Ransomware Review December 2024: FunkSec’s Meteoric Rise and the Growing Threat of RaaS
item.description: Discover key ransomware trends from December 2024, including FunkSec’s rise, RaaS innovations, and LockBit's bold new pricing strategy.

item.title: Focus Friday: Fortifying TPRM Against Kernel Compromise, Buffer Overflow, and Directory Traversal Vulnerabilities
item.description: Strengthen TPRM against kernel, buffer overflow, and directory traversal vulnerabilities in Juniper, MongoDB, and SAP with targeted insights.

item.title: Focus Friday: Third-Party Risks In PostgreSQL and Zimbra Vulnerabilities
item.description: Explore third-party risk impacts of CVE-2025-1094 in PostgreSQL and CVE-2023-34192 in Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS), plus steps to mitigate them.

item.title: FOCUS FRIDAY: TPRM Insights on FortiGate, QNAP, Mongoose, and W3 Total Cache Vulnerabilities with Black Kite’s FocusTags™
item.description: TPRM insights into vulnerabilities in FortiGate, QNAP, Mongoose, and W3 Total Cache. Learn how Black Kite’s FocusTags enhance vendor risk management.

item.title: BLACK KITE RESEARCH EXPOSES THE “SILENT BREACHES” LURKING WITHIN INTERCONNECTED ECOSYSTEMS
item.description: Discover Black Kite’s latest research exposing hidden breaches within interconnected ecosystems and the risks they pose to your supply chain.

item.title: Ransomware Review January 2025: Clop’s CLEO Exploit Fuels a Record Month
item.description: Get the latest insights from our monthly ransomware roundup: 546 incidents in January 2025, Clop’s CLEO exploit continues, and tips to reduce risk.

item.title: Focus Friday: Addressing Third-Party Risks in PAN-OS, Ivanti Connect Secure, Zimbra, and Cacti Vulnerabilities
item.description: Explore third-party risk impacts of PAN-OS, Ivanti, Zimbra, and Cacti vulnerabilities, plus how Black Kite’s FocusTags help mitigate them efficiently.

item.title: Infographic: Healthcare Under Siege – The Ransomware Epidemic
item.description: Explore why healthcare is a top ransomware target, with attacks rising 32.16% and patient safety at risk. Learn how to stay protected.

item.title: The Silent Breach: Why Third Parties Are Cybersecurity’s Greatest Hidden Threat
item.description: Silent breaches expose hidden vulnerabilities in third-party networks. Learn why they happen, their impact, and how to protect against them in 2025.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Implications of Kubernetes Ingress NGINX, Synology DSM, and Synapse Server Vulnerabilities
item.description: Explore critical vulnerabilities in Kubernetes, Synology, and Synapse. Learn TPRM implications and how to streamline risk management with vendors.

item.title: Key Takeaways from the 2025 Third-Party Breach Report
item.description: Discover key trends from the 2025 Third-Party Breach Report, including ransomware shifts, regulatory impacts, the rise of continuous risk monitoring.

item.title: Oracle Cloud Breach: Claims, Denials, and the Reality of Cloud Security Risks in TPRM
item.description: Claims of an Oracle Cloud breach conflict with official denials. Explore the cloud security risks and leaked data with analysis on the TPRM impact.

item.title: 3.8 Billion Stolen Credentials are out there! How about yours?
item.description: According to the 4iQ Identity Breach Report, 8.7 billion raw identity-record data are on the surface, deep, and dark web in 2017.

item.title: Artificial Intelligence for Cyber Security
item.description: Artificial intelligence for cyber security opens up new opportunities to protect organizations.

item.title: Lesson from TicketMaster Breach: CDN Security of third-party suppliers
item.description: UK-based company TicketMaster, a ticket sales and distribution company, experienced a major breach as they announced on June 27.

item.title: 3rd Party Vendors of Healthcare Providers Must Meet HIPAA Regulations
item.description: The HIPAA aims to protect health-related and personal information of individuals, including medical records, health insurance data, SSNs, etc.

item.title: Do You Monitor Your Suppliers? ISO/IEC 27001 Regulations Say You Should
item.description: Suppliers have become one of the weaker links in the system. thus, they should be constantly monitored as ISO 27001 standard suggests.

item.title: Your company accounts may be breached. Find out with Free Account Breach Search
item.description: Employees may use their same credentials (e-mail/username/password) used in their company accounts to register third-party services.

item.title: Major Third-Party Breaches Revealed in September 2018
item.description: We regularly update the list of major third-party (aka supply-chain) attacks and breaches that are revealed in September 2018.

item.title: Outsmart Your Hackers
item.description: lack Kite Cyber Risk Scorecards give you the visibility to outsmart your hackers.

item.title: British Airways Breach: Is it a third-party attack?
item.description: British Airways announced that 380,000 customer records containing credit card details had been taken during the cyber attack executed.

item.title: Open Invitation to Hackers: Misconfigured Cloud Servers
item.description: Many companies use cloud servers to store their data Misconfigured servers may expose sensitive data, a mistake which is an open invitation to hackers

item.title: Third-Party Risk Management from COBIT’s perspective
item.description: Black Kite Cyber Risk Scorecard check compliance to well-known cyber security frameworks including COBIT framework.

item.title: Reduce Your Cyber Exposure to Mitigate Your Cyber Risk
item.description: Explore how digital transformation enhances business efficiency while addressing the rising cyber risks associated with cloud services and IoT systems

item.title: Major third-party breaches revealed in October 2018
item.description: We regularly update the list of major third-party (aka supply-chain) attacks and breaches that are revealed in October 2018.

item.title: How Strong is Your SSL/TLS? 6 Simple Steps to Make it Stronger
item.description: Do you want to learn about how strong your SSL/TLS is? Here are the 6 simple steps to make it stronger.

item.title: Check Whether Your IP Assets Are Blacklisted Or Not For Free
item.description: To learn whether your company’s IP addresses are blacklisted, check Black Kite’s free IP Blacklist Search service.
